capture_conditions.notes: Source: TTB Public COLA Registry, TTB ID 23164001000869. TTB COLA composite artwork (full wraparound). Brewer: Catskill Brewery, LLC. Capture conditions matrix in SPEC §0.5 not directly applicable.

label_spec.name_address: BREWED & PACKAGED IN LIVINGSTON MANOR, NY  672 OLD ROUTE 17, LIVINGSTON MANOR, NY 12758
label_spec.health_warning_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
